fields.title: The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild
fields.description: An open-world adventure where you explore the kingdom of Hyrule, solve puzzles, and battle enemies to defeat Calamity Ganon.

fields.title: Minecraft
fields.description: A sandbox survival game where players mine resources, craft tools, and build anything they can imagine in a procedurally generated world.

fields.title: Stardew Valley
fields.description: A farming simulation RPG where you inherit a rundown farm and work to restore it while building relationships with townsfolk.

fields.title: Among Us
fields.description: A social deduction game set in space where crewmates complete tasks while trying to identify the hidden impostors among them.

fields.title: Elden Ring
fields.description: A dark fantasy action RPG set in the Lands Between, featuring challenging combat, deep lore, and a vast open world.

fields.title: Halo: Combat Evolved
fields.description: A landmark first-person shooter following Master Chief battling the alien Covenant and the parasitic Flood across alien ringworlds.

fields.title: Super Mario Odyssey
fields.description: A 3D platformer where Mario travels across diverse kingdoms collecting Power Moons to rescue Princess Peach from Bowser.

fields.title: FIFA 23
fields.description: The latest entry in EA's football simulation series featuring updated rosters, improved animations, and multiple competitive modes.

fields.title: Portal 2
fields.description: A mind-bending first-person puzzle game where players use a portal gun to solve increasingly complex physics-based challenges.

fields.title: Red Dead Redemption 2
fields.description: An epic open-world western following outlaw Arthur Morgan as the Van der Linde gang faces the end of the frontier era.

fields.title: Tetris Effect
fields.description: A stunning reimagining of the classic block puzzle game with immersive music and visuals that react to your gameplay.

fields.title: Call of Duty: Modern Warfare
fields.description: A gritty military first-person shooter with a cinematic campaign and a highly competitive multiplayer suite.

fields.title: The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt
fields.description: A massive open-world RPG following Geralt of Rivia as he hunts for his adopted daughter while navigating political turmoil.

fields.title: NBA 2K23
fields.description: A basketball simulation game featuring lifelike player animations, deep career modes, and online competitive leagues.

fields.title: Dark Souls
fields.description: A notoriously difficult action RPG set in the crumbling kingdom of Lordran where death is a core mechanic and patience is rewarded.

fields.title: Celeste
fields.description: A precision platformer following Madeline as she climbs Celeste Mountain, dealing with her inner demons along the way.

fields.title: Overwatch 2
fields.description: A team-based hero shooter where two teams of five compete across objective-based maps using a roster of unique heroes.

fields.title: Divinity: Original Sin 2
fields.description: A deep turn-based RPG with rich storytelling, complex elemental combat, and full cooperative multiplayer support.

fields.title: Hollow Knight
fields.description: A challenging action-adventure set in a vast underground kingdom of insects, with tight combat and atmospheric exploration.

fields.title: Super Smash Bros. Ultimate
fields.description: A crossover fighting game featuring over 80 playable characters from gaming history battling across iconic stages.
